## Summary

Integrate **Trustless Work** (Stellar escrow infrastructure) as the first partner platform on **testnet**, reporting `escrow_completed` events to ZCore when funds are released from a completed escrow.

ZCore already accepts partner events via `POST /api/events/report`; this issue covers the **Trustless WorkтАУspecific adapter**, tx verification, and documentation so their team (or ZCore indexer) can productionize the flow.

---

## Why Trustless Work

- Escrow-as-a-Service on Soroban тАФ mature REST API + SDK
- SCF Integration Track тАФ ecosystem expects builders **on top of** TW, not competing
- Clean credit signal: completed escrow = verified delivery + payment release
- Docs: https://docs.trustlesswork.com/

**Scoring in ZCore:**

| Event | Max impact | Formula (see `scoring.service.ts`) |
|-------|------------|-------------------------------------|
| `escrow_completed` | 60 pts/event | base 15 + per-USDC, capped |

---

## Trustless Work API reference

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| Testnet base URL | `https://dev.api.trustlesswork.com` |
| Mainnet base URL | `https://api.trustlesswork.com` |
| Swagger testnet | https://dev.api.trustlesswork.com/docs |
| API key | Request at https://dapp.trustlesswork.com тЖТ Settings тЖТ API Keys |
| Auth header | `x-api-key: <key>` |
| Rate limit | 50 requests / 60 seconds |

**Core escrow flow:**
1. Deploy escrow (`/deployer/single-release` or `multi-release`)
2. Fund escrow (`/escrow/{type}/fund-escrow`)
3. Milestones (multi-release): approve, change status
4. **Release funds** (`/escrow/{type}/release-funds` or `release-milestone-funds`)
5. Sign unsigned XDR in wallet тЖТ `POST /helper/send-transaction` with `{ signedXdr }`

> **Important:** Trustless Work does **not** document outbound webhooks to third parties. Integration options are:
> - **A)** TW team calls ZCore after successful release (partnership)
> - **B)** ZCore indexer listens to on-chain TW contract events
> - **C)** PoC: manual/scripted report after demo escrow

---

## ZCore event payload

When an escrow completes, report to ZCore:

```json
POST https://zcore-api.vercel.app/api/events/report
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "apiKey": "<trustless_work_platform_key_from_zcore_admin>",
  "eventType": "escrow_completed",
  "walletAddress": "G<SERVICE_PROVIDER>",
  "counterpartyWallet": "G<APPROVER_OR_BUYER>",
  "amount": 500,
  "currency": "USDC",
  "txHash": "<stellar_tx_hash_from_release_funds>",
  "timestamp": "2026-06-18T12:00:00Z"
}
```

**Business rule to confirm with TW product:**
- `walletAddress` = **service provider / freelancer** (receiver of released funds) тАФ recommended for credit scoring
- `counterpartyWallet` = approver / client (enables anti-Sybil decay)

---

## Current ZCore processing pipeline

**File:** `Server/src/controllers/events.controller.ts`

1. Validate platform `apiKey` тЖТ `Platform` row
2. User must exist (registered via wallet auth)
3. `txHash` unique in `CreditEvent`
4. `verifyTransaction(txHash)` via Horizon тАФ **currently only checks tx exists + successful** тЪая╕П
5. Wallet age тЙе 30 days (#6)
6. Monthly cap 10 scoring events (#7)
7. Counterparty decay
8. Calculate impact тЖТ update score

**Gap to address in this issue:** Strengthen verification for TW тАФ confirm tx invokes TW escrow **release** (not arbitrary successful tx). Suggested new module: `Server/src/services/verify/trustless-work.verify.ts`

---

## Implementation tasks

### Phase 0 тАФ Access & platform registration

- [ ] Obtain Trustless Work testnet API key (BackOffice dApp)
- [ ] Register platform in ZCore:
  ```bash
  curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/platforms/register \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -H "x-admin-secret: $ADMIN_SECRET" \
    -d '{
      "platformId": "trustless-work",
      "name": "Trustless Work",
      "webhookUrl": "https://api.trustlesswork.com/webhooks/zcore"
    }'
  ```
- [ ] Store production platform key securely (not `dev_tw_key_local`)

### Phase 1 тАФ Testnet escrow PoC

- [ ] Complete full TW testnet escrow (deploy тЖТ fund тЖТ release) using [Developer Guide](https://docs.trustlesswork.com/trustless-work/introduction/developer-resources)
- [ ] Capture `txHash` from `send-transaction` response
- [ ] Register both wallets in ZCore dapp
- [ ] Report event with platform key тЖТ verify score increase + history entry

### Phase 2 тАФ Verification hardening

- [ ] Parse Horizon tx operations for Soroban invoke to TW contract
- [ ] Allowlist TW contract addresses (testnet/mainnet) in config
- [ ] Reject report if tx is not a release operation
- [ ] Unit tests with mocked Horizon responses

### Phase 3 тАФ Documentation

- [ ] Add `Docs/integrations/trustless-work.md`:
  - When to call ZCore (after release success)
  - Payload field definitions
  - Error codes (401, 404, 409, 400)
  - Example curl + sequence diagram
- [ ] Update Swagger description on `/api/events/report`

### Phase 4 тАФ Partnership (optional)

- [ ] Contact TW team: propose automatic POST to ZCore on release
- [ ] Define retry/idempotency (txHash dedup already handled)

---

## How to test locally

```bash
npm run setup
npm run dev:server   # :3000
npm run dev:front    # :3001

# Use dev platform key from seed:
# apiKey: dev_tw_key_local
```

1. Register wallet A (provider) in dapp
2. Complete TW escrow on testnet involving wallet A
3. POST event with real release txHash
4. Check dashboard score + `/dashboard/history`

---

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] At least one **real testnet** escrow release tx reported and scored
- [ ] Event visible in `GET /api/user/{wallet}/history`
- [ ] Anti-Sybil rules respected (age, cap, txHash uniqueness)
- [ ] Integration guide committed under `Docs/integrations/`
- [ ] Verification beyond bare Horizon success (release-specific)
- [ ] Documented which wallet receives credit points

---

## Dependencies

- #15 production DB (for prod deployment)
- #5 seed script (local dev keys)
- Recommended: #21 tests for event pipeline
